visualMatch.reason: Aura3D shows a neon circular tunnel mouth but reads more like a static ring than a full flythrough. Three.js shows a polished glowing tunnel with clear depth and motion cue.

modifiability.reason: Three.js has explicit geometry/camera path code; Aura3D is shorter but less complete visually.
